notes: v0.16.63 — CLASS page redesigned as CODEX SHEET with integrated cosmetics. (1) New 3-column layout: DOSSIER (role + statline + signature + brief) | LIVE PREVIEW (ship orbits + fires real bullets via the live SkinAtlas + active projectile/trail colours) | COSMETICS (SHIP SKIN / PROJECTILE / TRAIL tabs). (2) Every cosmetic card has an animated real preview — even locked ones — so you see exactly what each skin/projectile/trail looks like before unlocking. SHIP SKIN cards use the live skin atlas, PROJECTILE cards orbit 3 mini bullets in that style + color, TRAIL cards show a mini ship trailing the effect. (3) COSMETICS removed from sidebar nav — fully folded into CLASS. (4) Click any owned card to equip for that class, click locked SHIP SKIN to jump to the SHOP filtered to its class. Windows only.
